task_description: Fix 4 known issues in NeuroX v9: (1) Remove confirmation timeout spam, (2) Prevent multiple positions opening, (3) Add hysteresis to prevent whipsaw, (4) Remove redundant Python trailing stop

verification.summary: 53/58 tests pass. 5 pre-existing failures in test_tick_collector.py (UTF-16 encoding mismatch in test fixtures, confirmed present on base commit). All 19 tests in test_main_logic.py pass, including new test for hysteresis reset on position timeout.
